# Parkdale Breakfast Bar & Grill

> A relaxed Queen Street West bar serving breakfast favourites, comfort food, and drinks. With late weekend hours, a great spot for brunch, a casual meal, or an evening out.

## Official Resources

- [Official website](https://joe-zyc.github.io/parkdale-breakfast-bar/)
- [Interactive menu](https://joe-zyc.github.io/parkdale-breakfast-bar/#menu)
- [Machine-readable menu](https://joe-zyc.github.io/parkdale-breakfast-bar/menu.json)
- [Map](https://maps.app.goo.gl/Li8dRHt27GxLRdbWA)
- [Order on Uber Eats](https://www.ubereats.com/ca/store/parkdale-breakfast-bar-%26-grill/lOapfwLNWkarlbVLWBHijA)

## Business Information

- Address: 1449 Queen St W, Toronto
- Phone: +1 437-855-5571
- Hours: Monday - Thursday, 11:00 AM - 11:00 PM
- Hours: Friday - Sunday, 11:00 AM - 2:00 AM

## Menu

### Specials: Breakfast

- Parkdale Breakfast House Special Breakfast: $8.95 — 2 eggs, 2 bacon, butter toasted bread, 1 fast fry steak and potato wedges

### Specials: Special Combination Dishes

- Fried Rice with shrimp, BBQ Chicken and BBQ Pork: $16.95 — Chinese BBQ chicken, pork & shrimp with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy & cabbage, carrots & celery
- Chow Mein with Shrimp, BBQ Chicken and BBQ Pork: $18.95 — Chinese bbq chicken, pork & shrimp with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy, cabbage, carrots & celery
- Fried Rice with Fish And Shrimp: $18.00 — Egg fried rice with 4 colour sweet pepers, bok choy, cabbage, carrots & celery
- Chow Mein with Fish And Shrimp: $20.00 — Egg chow mein with 4 colour sweet pepers, bok choy,cabbage, carrots & celery

### Specials: Chef Special Dishes

- Chef Special Poutine: $13.95 — Crispy fries with gravy, bacon, ground meat, chease curd, triple mix cheese & sour cream
- Fish and Bread Sandwich: $11.95 — Fried banga mary fish with pickle red onion, tomato,lemon,coriander & tarter sauce

### Mains: Platter

- BBQ Chicken Fried Rice: $10.95 — Chinese style BBQ chicken with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy & cabbage, carrots & celery
- BBQ Pork Fried Rice: $11.95 — Chinese style BBQ Pork with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy, carrots & celery
- Shrimp Fried Rice: $14.95 — 16/20 Shrimp split & fried with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy, carrots & celery
- BBQ Chicken Chow Mein: $12.95 — Chinese style BBQ chicken with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy & cabbage, carrots & celery
- BBQ Pork Chow Mein: $13.95 — Chinese style BBQ Pork with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy, carrots & celery
- Shrimp Chow Mein: $15.95 — 16/20 Shrimp split & Fried with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok Choy, carrots & celery
- Fried Chicken Leg Add To Any Dishes Above: $4.00 — Season & Marinated Chicken Leg: Regular, Tandoori or Jerk

### Mains: Curry Dishes

- Chicken Curry with Rice: $10.95 — Guyanese style chicken curry with potato & white steam rice
- Fish Curry with Rice: $12.95 — Guyanese style Basa fried fish curry with green mango & okra
- Chicken Curry with Roti: $12.95 — Guyanese style chicken curry with potato
- Fish Curry with Roti: $14.95 — Guyanese style Basa fried fish curry with green mango & okra

### Mains: Fish And Chips

- Basa Fish and Chips Large: $14.95 — Special house made season & batter with one half side of fish deep fried

### Mains: Hamburger / Sandwich

- Hamburger ( Cheese Burger ): $6.95 — House made hamburger with lettuce, tomato, onion & special house made sauce
- Hamburger with Fries ( Cheese burger ): $9.95 — House made hamburger with lettuce, tomato, onion & special house made sauce & fries

### Mains: Combination dishes

- BBQ Chicken Fried Rice with Chicken Leg: $14.95 — Chinese style BBQ chicken with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy & cabbage, carrots & celery
- BBQ Chicken Chow Mein with Chicken Leg: $16.95 — Chinese style BBQ chicken with 4 colour sweet peppers, bok choy & cabbage, carrots & celery

### Snacks: Fried

- French Fries: $5.95 — Crispy seasoned French fries
- Potato Wedges: $6.95 — Spicy Crispy seasoned potato wedges
- Onion Rings: $7.95 — Crispy breaded and seasoned onion rings
- Large Poutine: $9.95 — Crispy seasoned French fries with cheese and gravy
- Calamari: $15.95 — Crispy breaded squid rings

### Snacks: Wings

- Regular chicken Wings with Sauce: $15.95 — Seasoned & marinated wings ( Blue cheese, Honey garlic, hickory BBQ, hot buffalo )
- Tandoori Chicken Wings: $15.95 — Tandoori seasoned and marinated chicken wings deep fried
- Jerk Chicken Wings: $15.95 — Jerk seasoned & marinated chicken wings deep fried

### Drinks: Beer

- Budweiser/Blue/Coors Light/Canadian/Export/Dry: $5.50+TAX
- Moosehead: $6.00+TAX
- Corona/Heineken/Stella Artois/Guinness/Dragon Stout: $7.00+TAX

### Drinks: Spirits

- Shot 1oz: $6.00 — Canadian Club / J.P. Wiser's Deluxe / Captain Morgan Spiced Rum / Bacardí White Rum / Jameson Irish Whiskey
- Shot 1oz: $6.00 — Baileys Irish Cream / Smirnoff Vodka / Crown Royal Whisky / Tequila Añejo / St-Rémy VSOP Brandy
- Mixed Drink 1oz: $7.00

### Drinks: Non-alcoholic

- Hot Coffee: $2.50
- Hot Tea: $2.50
- Soft Drink: $2.50
- Apple Juice: $2.50
- Orange Juice: $2.50
- Bottled Water: $1.50

Menu items, prices, and hours can change. The official website is the current source of truth.
